Song: You Took the Words Right Out of My Mouth (Hot Summer Night)
DJ Notes: IT'S TIME, PEOPLE!! Meatloaf debuts on FTA!! I love the intro in this song and as hot summer nights begin to arrive, it's only appropriate to listen to our fearless Rock Immortal, Meatloaf. If I was the athletic director of a school with a wolf for a mascot, I would play this song before the home team runs out of the tunnel (yes, I think about this stuff!!). The crowd would yell "YES!" after each one of the woman's questions, and then when Meatloaf asks one more time if she'll give her throat to the wolf with the red roses, and she says "yes", the entire crowd screams "I BET YOU SAY THAT TO ALL THE BOYS" and then a ripping guitar intro plays as the team runs out and we go undefeated at home in all sports ever. Thank you for coming to my TED talk.
This song makes me want to go on an adventure and it's the season for adventure so it's appropriate.
